subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of His Holiness Baha'u'llah! The letters thou hadst written... The Star of the West must, at present, be written both in English and Persian.
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @newspapers and the media; publications, @review of publications, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
